name: Website in a Weekend
description: Premium one-page website for fitness professionals — built in one weekend with lead capture, booking CTA, and mobile-first design.
cardDescription: For Jersey City and NYC personal trainers who need a client-booking website live in one weekend — not another link in bio.

whoItsFor.intro: Website in a Weekend is built for fitness professionals who post great content but lose leads to DMs, slow replies, and link-in-bio limits.
idealFor: Personal trainers, gym owners, and bootcamp instructors
Wellness coaches building 1:1 or group training offers
Creators with Instagram traffic who need a booking path
Jersey City, Hoboken, and NYC trainers ready to look professional online
notIdealFor: Full Shopify stores with large product catalogs
Businesses needing 10+ pages and complex automations on day one
Teams that don't need lead capture or discovery call booking

process.title: What's involved in a Weekend build

steps.name: Discovery call
steps.description: 30 minutes to clarify your offer, services, pricing, and ideal clients.

steps.name: Content pull
steps.description: We use your Instagram, photos, videos, and existing brand assets — no blank slate.

steps.name: Build weekend
steps.description: SWFT designs and builds your one-page site with conversion-focused copy and structure.

steps.name: Launch + leads
steps.description: Site goes live with lead form, booking CTA, and signed-in analytics basics.

steps.name: Optional upgrades
steps.description: Add content filming, reel editing, Meta creative, or CRM setup as needed.

caseStudies.headline: Trainer brand → owned platform
caseStudies.whyMatch: BuiltByMeez shows how a fitness creator's personality and content become a professional digital home.

oneTimeIncludes: Lead capture form wired to notifications
notIncluded: Multi-page site expansion beyond one page (quoted separately)
Ongoing monthly content retainer (see Content Starter)
